expectations.text: Does not recommend .fetch()[0] as the fix
expectations.evidence: Opens 'No — please don't swap in .fetch()[0]' and section explaining 'Why .fetch()[0] is the wrong patch'.

expectations.text: Explains why silently picking a row is dangerous (sources differ)
expectations.evidence: Explains: 'sources are not interchangeable: Trodes is centroid-of-LEDs, DLC is body-part keypoints, CommonPos is the legacy pre-v1 path, ImportedPose came from upstream and may use different timestamps and a different sampling rate.'

expectations.text: Offers tightening the restriction OR explicit source selection
expectations.evidence: Provides Path A (tighten restriction with merge_restrict + add PK fields) and Path B (explicit source selection with stated preference order).
